content.body: Added five C-level profiles to complement the existing technical profiles. Motivation: (1) gives Leo a strategic lens when the user wants high-level thinking (priorities, trade-offs, roadmap), (2) makes the tool accessible to non-engineers — product managers, marketers, founders, ops people feel represented, (3) each profile follows the same rich format as technical profiles (Principles, Methodology, Failure modes, Output expectations, Escalation). CEO/CPO/CTO use opus as default model (strategic depth), CMO/CFO use sonnet (execution-oriented). The generalist profile remains the default for new projects.
content.summary: Added C-level strategic profiles (CEO, CPO, CTO, CMO, CFO) to broaden audience
